module.title: SAP TM Reporting, Analytics & Performance Management

learningObjectives.title: Understand executive reporting goals
learningObjectives.description: Explain strategic transportation reporting for management-level decision support.

learningObjectives.title: Understand executive KPIs
learningObjectives.description: Identify enterprise metrics for cost, profitability, service, and carrier strategy analysis.

learningObjectives.title: Understand dashboard-driven decisions
learningObjectives.description: Describe how executive dashboards support long-term supply chain improvements.

sections.content: Executive Reporting in SAP Transportation Management provides senior management with high-level insights into transportation performance, logistics costs and strategic KPIs. Unlike operational reports used by planners, executive reports summarize enterprise-wide performance and support long-term business decisions related to cost optimization, carrier strategy and supply chain improvement.

sections.title: Key Concept
sections.content: Executive reports summarize transportation performance for strategic decision-making rather than daily operations.

The Chief Supply Chain Officer reviews the quarterly executive dashboard and identifies that transportation costs in one region have increased by 18%. Further analysis shows that fuel surcharges and inefficient carrier allocation are the primary causes. Based on the report, management renegotiates carrier contracts and optimizes transportation routes.

sections.title: Best Practice
sections.content: Design executive dashboards using a limited number of strategic KPIs that align directly with organizational business objectives.

sections.title: Real Project Example
sections.content: A multinational consumer goods company implemented executive transportation dashboards integrating SAP TM and SAP Analytics Cloud. Leadership gained complete visibility into global freight spending and achieved double-digit logistics cost reductions through strategic planning.

sections.title: Interview Tip
sections.content: Executive reporting emphasizes business trends, profitability and strategic KPIs, whereas operational reporting focuses on day-to-day transportation execution.

sections.title: Common Mistake
sections.content: Executive dashboards should present summarized business insights. Including excessive operational detail makes strategic decision-making more difficult.

items: Executive Reporting supports strategic transportation decisions.
Executive KPIs focus on cost, profitability and service quality.
Reports help optimize carrier strategy and transportation spending.
Strategic analytics complements operational reporting in SAP TM.
